notes: ERPNext uses the generic Frappe Framework REST API. Adaptor operations map as: create -> POST /api/resource/{doctype}, read -> GET /api/resource/{doctype}/{name}, update -> PUT /api/resource/{doctype}/{name}, deleteRecord -> DELETE, getList -> GET /api/resource/{doctype}, getCount -> GET /api/method/frappe.client.get_count. Documents are schemaless per doctype; Customer/Item/SalesOrder modelled as representative reusable shapes. Server URL is a placeholder site host.
